title: Gate 3 — STOP/opt-out: number-level Do_Not_Text + H2 coupling
summary: Inbound STOP/unsubscribe/'do not text'/'remove number' now flips Do_Not_Text=true number-level (every record sharing the agent phone, via scan-comms' phoneToListings group), suppresses the tier-0 auto-close, gated by STOP_OPT_OUT_LIVE (default OFF, watched-first). H2 cannot fire a live text unless opt-out enforcement is live (h2-outreach forces dry otherwise). Wired to the existing reply-triage detection + the M6 capture path. Closes the last compliance blocker before live H2 (Gates 1 + 2 already passed).
